text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Once I've finished helping the teacher, I<n>believe
that one classmate wanted to<n>talk to me... After
that, I need to prep<n>for my lessons.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm cutting it close schedule-wise, but it<n>should be
fine!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it feels nice to have so many<n>people
depending on me.
